tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: THE SAHARA DESERT
tasks.text:
The Sahara is 1.1. _________ largest hot desert in the world. It covers most of North Africa and is almost 1.2. _________ big as the whole of Europe. Although many people think that the Sahara is nothing 1.3. _________ sand, only about a quarter of it is actually sandy. The rest is made up 1.4. _________ rocky plains and mountains.

Daytime temperatures in the Sahara 1.5. _________ reach over 50 degrees Celsius, but at night 1.6. _________ can drop below freezing. Very 1.7. _________ rain falls in this region, sometimes less than 25 millimetres a year. Despite the extreme conditions, 1.8. _________ animals and plants have adapted to life there.

People have lived in the Sahara for thousands of years. The Tuareg are 1.9. _________ of the best-known groups. They have 1.10. _________ travelling across the desert with their camels for centuries, trading goods between different regions.
